name: Night Lights
short_description: Night Lights is a relaxing puzzle platformer where you manipulate light and shadow to guide a small robot through a calm, atmospheric world.
detailed_description:
A Calm Puzzle Platformer About Light and Shadow

Night Lights is a relaxing puzzle platformer focused on atmosphere, exploration, and gentle problem-solving. You control a small robot navigating a dark world where light is the key mechanic, used to reveal paths, activate platforms, and solve environmental puzzles.

The game is designed to be approachable and stress-free, offering a peaceful experience rather than fast reflex challenges.

Thoughtful Puzzles and Gentle Gameplay

Gameplay revolves around manipulating light sources to interact with the environment. Each level introduces new puzzle ideas while remaining easy to understand and satisfying to solve. Progress is steady and accessible, making Night Lights suitable for players of all skill levels.

There is no combat and no pressure — the focus is entirely on discovery and puzzle-solving at your own pace.

A Cozy and Atmospheric Experience

Night Lights features a minimalist visual style and a calm soundtrack that reinforce its soothing tone. The world feels quiet and reflective, making it ideal for players looking for a short, relaxing game or a family-friendly puzzle experience.

Key Features

  • Puzzle platformer focused on light and shadow mechanics

  • Relaxing, non-violent gameplay

  • Atmospheric visuals and calming soundtrack

  • Exploration-based puzzle design

  • Accessible difficulty for all skill levels

  • Single-player experience suitable for casual play
